The '''Mundi family''' was a [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] family from [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]]. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] was the most famous member of the family. Due to the low Cerean birthrate, he was allowed by the other [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to follow the Cerean custom of polygamous marriage—he had four honor wives and seven daughters. The entire family was killed during the [[Battle of Cerea]]; Ki-Adi himself died when [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] was issued during the [[Battle of Mygeeto|Battle]] of [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeeto]].

*[[Droe]] - Ki-Adi-Mundi's elder sister
*[[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]]
*[[Shea]] - Ki-Adi-Mundi's bond wife
*[[Mawin]] - Ki-Adi-Mundi's fourth wife
**[[Sylvn (Cerean)|Sylvn]] - Ki-Adi-Mundi's daughter by Mawin
